input: Design analytics models for our e-commerce platform using dbt
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces source-to-target mapping, star schema modeling, dbt project structure with staging/intermediate/marts layers, testing strategy, and documentation plan

input: Plan data transformations for a 500M-row event table with incremental strategies
expected_behavior: Skill activates and recommends incremental materialization (microbatch or merge), partition pruning, clustering keys, and cost optimization for large-scale fact tables

input: We use stored procedures in SQL Server for all our transformations. Help us model our data.
expected_behavior: Skill activates, acknowledges stored procedure environment, recommends migration path to dbt or similar framework, and adapts modeling patterns to current tooling

input: Define data contracts between our analytics and data science teams
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces contract specifications with schema enforcement, breaking change policies, testing pyramid, and CI/CD integration for cross-team interfaces

input: Design a revenue dashboard with drill-down charts and KPI cards
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is a BI/dashboard design request, not analytics engineering. Should route to bi-architecture skill instead.
